title: Please add arg “--pidfile” for supporting to get container process pid from file
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind feature

**Description**

Please add arg “--pidfile”.   Write the pid of the **container** process to a file. 

I start my worker porcess in container which created by `Podman run`, and want to get the container process pid. I will save the pid in `struct map`. I have tried the NOTIFY_SOCKET, but it always return conmon process pid.

How about add  arg “--pidfile” in Podman cli?

comments.body: This seems reasonable, and should be simple enough. I don't think we can support with podman-remote but that shouldn't be a large issue.
Interested in opening a PR to add this feature?

> Interested in opening a PR to add this feature?

@mheon @rhatdan  I am glad to open a PR  for it.
